headline: Stanley Black & Decker Supports National Mall Restoration for America's 250th Anniversary with DEWALT® Tool Donations and Funding
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), a global leader in tools and outdoor solutions, announced today a $300,000 contribution to the Trust for the National Mall to support the preservation and care of the National Mall and Memorial Parks in Washington, D.C., by the National Park Service (NPS).

content.title: Stanley Black & Decker Supports National Mall Restoration for America's 250th Anniversary with DEWALT® Tool Donations and Funding
content.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), a global leader in tools and outdoor solutions, announced today a $300,000 contribution to the Trust for the National Mall to support the preservation and care of the National Mall and Memorial Parks in Washington, D.C., by the National Park Service (NPS).

thumbnail.caption: Stanley Black & Decker’s contribution to the Trust for the National Mall for America’s 250th Anniversary reflects its ongoing commitment to strengthening communities and supporting the preservation of public spaces through meaningful partnerships and resources.

headline: CRAFTSMAN® Launches New V20* ADVANCED™ Batteries to Help DIYers Power Through More Demanding Jobs
summary: CRAFTSMAN®, a Stanley Black & Decker brand, announced the launch of the CRAFTSMAN V20* ADVANCED™ Batteries, designed to deliver bigger power for bigger DIY projects. Compatible with existing CRAFTSMAN V20* tools, the new batteries deliver more power, longer runtime and lots of "whoa". It's like giving your existing tools a power boost.

content.title: CRAFTSMAN® Launches New V20* ADVANCED™ Batteries to Help DIYers Power Through More Demanding Jobs

thumbnail.caption: CRAFTSMAN® announced the launch of the CRAFTSMAN V20* ADVANCED™ Batteries, designed to deliver bigger power for bigger DIY projects.

headline: Is JAKKS’ Renewed BLACK+DECKER Toy Deal Shaping Stanley Black & Decker’s Brand Strategy (SWK)?
summary: On 18 May 2026, JAKKS Pacific, Inc. announced it had renewed and extended its long-standing licensing agreement with Stanley Black & Decker for the BLACK+DECKER toy line through December 2028, covering an expanded portfolio of role-play housewares, kitchen products, tools and other categories across the US, Canada, Mexico and Colombia. This extended licensing deal reinforces the BLACK+DECKER brand’s reach with younger consumers, potentially supporting Stanley Black & Decker’s broader brand...

This extended licensing deal reinforces the BLACK+DECKER brand’s reach with younger consumers, potentially supporting Stanley Black & Decker’s broader brand...
